creator: sega01@go-beyond.org
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #14)

You're welcome! I appreciate your feedback. I think it'd be great to have people test on different architectures. I just have x86_64, although at some point I could probably setup a Raspberry Pi and test this on it.

The old mkclean didn't support Opus audio streams and would remove them, but this newer version will preserve Opus which I think is great.
